rag_rules: Place input assumptions and output guarantees in component type annexes when concrete bounds or visible relations are available
Use only visible feature names in component type contracts; avoid implementation-only subcomponent paths
Write output dependency guarantees that relate visible outputs to visible inputs
Use `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks for AGREE contracts in component type scopes
generic_rules: Use concrete bounds or visible relations for input assumptions and output guarantees
Avoid implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts
Relate visible outputs to visible inputs in output dependency guarantees
Use `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks for AGREE contracts in component type scopes
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use exact Boolean expressions only when the port is an AGREE bool in scope
Avoid range comparisons or 0/1 equality over Boolean, enumeration-like, or opaque data ports
anti_patterns: Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions without explicit typed ports or constants
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers for range comparisons
irrelevant_topics: AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables
